issue_title: fix: `dialog` and `drawer` footer gap in small screen
issue_body_preview:
## Description

修复`Dialog`和`Drawer`的底部按钮在小屏幕下没有间距的问题。fixed #5022

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [x] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature
test_description_zh: 在小屏幕（如移动端或窄浏览器窗口）下打开 Dialog 或 Drawer 组件，观察底部操作按钮（如确认、取消）之间的间距表现。
expected_result_zh: 在小屏幕下，Dialog 和 Drawer 底部的操作按钮之间应保持合理的间距，按钮不会紧贴在一起，布局正常且可正常点击操作。
